final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu cover for the announcement "GPT-image-2 is now live on Lovart platform," with elevated editorial magazine aesthetics.

Style/medium: editorial magazine cover with the geometric restraint of a modern fashion publication, designed for social feed impact
Composition: diagonal layout, subject and text arranged along a dynamic diagonal axis creating visual tension and movement
Subject: the announcement "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as typographic hero elements, positioned to guide the eye across the diagonal
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal backdrop allowing the diagonal typography to breathe and dominate
Lighting/mood: crisp directional light creating subtle depth, the confidence of a breaking news announcement
Color palette: high-contrast accent colors — deep blacks or rich navy against electric highlights, the tension between restraint and announcement
Materials/textures: matte paper finish with subtle editorial grain, the tactile quality of a premium print magazine
Text (verbatim): GPT-image-2, Lovart
Constraints: diagonal composition mandatory, both brand names must be prominent and legible, Xiaohongshu 3:4 vertical format
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, low contrast, centered static composition, decorative elements that compete with the announcement
